name: hello_test
author: Test Author
description: Simple test plugin for installation workflow validation.

name: trivia
author: SparkSage Community
description: Interactive trivia game commands for Discord servers. Supports multiple quiz formats and leaderboards.

name: moderation_tools
author: SparkSage Community
description: Advanced moderation tools including auto-moderation, profanity filters, and user warnings.

name: user_stats
author: SparkSage Community
description: Track and display user statistics including chat activity, contribution scores, and achievements.

name: music_player
author: SparkSage Community
description: Play music in voice channels with playlist support. Uses YouTube or Spotify as sources.

name: role_manager
author: SparkSage Community
description: Automated role assignment based on user reactions or profile settings. Simplifies server management.

name: custom_commands
author: SparkSage Community
description: Create custom commands without coding. Perfect for server-specific jokes and responses.

name: welcome_bot
author: SparkSage Community
description: Automatically greet new members with customizable messages and role assignments.

name: suggestion_system
author: SparkSage Community
description: Allow server members to submit suggestions with voting and admin review system.
